rationale: Educ. Code §12.1058 governs how open-enrollment charter schools are treated as political subdivisions. It references Tax Code §11.11, not §11.13(b). The proposed homestead exemption increase does not interact with this statute.
quote: (7) a political subdivision for purposes of Section 11.11, Tax Code.
_note: No conflict. §12.1058(a)(7) references Tax Code §11.11 (exemptions for organizations), not §11.13(b) (residence homestead exemption). The proposed change to §11.13(b) is unrelated to charter school applicability provisions.
